---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new coverage, a new concept page, or a pipeline improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

{{What can't the skill help an agent do today? Describe the use case (e.g. "no concept
page covers X", "component Y's card is missing guidance for Z"), not the solution.}}

## Proposed change

{{Sketch what you'd add or change. For new prose, note the m3.material.io / upstream
source it would cite. For a pipeline change, note which script and what it would emit.}}

## Provenance

{{If this adds prose: what facts would it restate, and from which cited source? Confirm
it would paraphrase (not copy) m3.material.io guidance — see CONTRIBUTING.md.}}

## Alternatives considered

{{What did you try? Why doesn't the current skill cover it?}}
